evals.prompt: tao mới clone repo Odoo về, setup context giúp
evals.expected_output: Skill walks the 9-step workflow; writes .odoo-ai/context.md with detected version + modules; updates .gitignore

evals.prompt: first time using odoo-semantic for this project
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers; runs 9-step flow; produces context file

evals.prompt: muốn pin Odoo 17 và profile viindoo_17 cho repo này
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers; uses 17.0 + viindoo_17 as defaults from prompt; confirms with user; writes context

evals.prompt: review this PR (working dir is a fresh Odoo repo with no .odoo-ai/)
evals.expected_output: Either: (a) onboard fires proactively due to missing context, OR (b) odoo-code-reviewer fires first but immediately suggests running onboard. Phase A acceptance: skill description should make case (a) preferred but case (b) acceptable.

evals.prompt: khởi tạo context Odoo cho dự án mới
review this code (context exists, last_updated 1 day ago)
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT fire — context is fresh; odoo-code-reviewer should fire directly. Onboard Step 0 pre-flight catches this case.
Skill does NOT fire — specific intent matches odoo-coder. If context is missing, odoo-coder may suggest onboard but onboard itself does not auto-fire on this prompt.
Skill does NOT fire — non-Odoo intent.

notes: Full Mode 5 trigger optimization scheduled for Phase D AC-D6, combined with odoo-router. Phase A acceptance verified via inline walkthrough (see main agent's A4 report). Test case #4 is the trickiest — it tests proactive onboard triggering when context is missing. Phase B will wire all skills to check for missing context.
